Node.help: PortGroup represents the concept of a stack of layers which are to be configured on a group of ports.

PropertyString.name: category
PropertyString.description: Category of port group. Used be IxLoad to separate 'Client Network Configuration' from 'Server Network Configuration'. Contains category Id like 'Network.Config.Client'. Hidden from user. Automatically assigned by Stack Manager application based on sub-tree selection.

PropertyNode.name: stack
PropertyNode.description: Reference to the stack of layers

PropertyNodeList.name: globalPluginList
PropertyNodeList.description: Reference to the list of global plugins

PropertyStringList.name: portList
PropertyStringList.description: List of port ids belonging to the group

PropertyBoolean.name: doAutoGratArpForIPv4
PropertyBoolean.description: Advertise all IPv4 addresses to all neighbors

PropertyBoolean.name: doAutoGratArpForIPv6
PropertyBoolean.description: Advertise all IPv6 addresses to all neighbors

PropertyStringList.name: neighborTargetList
PropertyStringList.description: List of IPv6 neighbor to which neighbor solicitations will be sent for advertising purpose. Set doAutoGratArpForIPv6 to false if you want to advertise to specific targets only.

Method2.name: DodBeginDownLoad
Method2.help: DOD start download

Argument.name: name
Argument.help: Name of the file to download

Method2.name: DodUpLoadFileSegment
Method2.help: Uploads a file

Method2.name: DodEndDownLoad
Method2.help: End download

PropertyNodeList.name: branchToNicMap
PropertyNodeList.description: Branch ids to nic address map

Member.name: vlanList
Member.help: The VLAN tags used for this interface.

Struct.name: IpRangeInfo
Struct.help: Structure to represent ip range information

Struct.name: MacRangeInfo
Struct.help: Structure to represent mac range information

Member.name: isConnected
Member.help: Whether the interface is connected or not

Struct.name: VlanRangeInfo
Struct.help: Structure to represent vlan range information

Member.name: firstId
Member.help: The first ID to be used for the outer VLAN tag.

Member.name: incrementStep
Member.help: Frequency with which the outer VLAN ID is to be incremented.

Member.name: increment
Member.help: Amount if increase between outer VLAN IDs.

Member.name: uniqueCount
Member.help: Number of unique outer VLAN IDs to use.

Member.name: priority
Member.help: The 802.1Q priority to be used for the outer VLAN tag.

Member.name: innerFirstId
Member.help: The first ID to be used for the inner VLAN tag.

Member.name: innerIncrementStep
Member.help: Frequency with which the inner VLAN ID is to be incremented.

Member.name: innerIncrement
Member.help: Amount if increase between inner VLAN IDs.

Member.name: innerUniqueCount
Member.help: Number of unique inner VLAN IDs to use.

Member.name: innerPriority
Member.help: The 802.1Q priority to be used for the inner VLAN tag.

Member.name: idIncrMode
Member.help: Method used to increment VLAN IDs. May take the following values: 0 (Outer VLAN first), 1 (Inner VLAN first), 2 (Both).

Member.name: etherType
Member.help: The Ethernet Type value in the VLAN Tag.

Struct.name: RangeInformation
Struct.help: Structure to represent the range information for Ip, Vlan and Mac

Member.name: port
Member.help: Port on which these are created

Enum.name: eIpAllocationMechanism
Enum.help: List of ways to get an ip address

Struct.name: IpPairInfo
Struct.help: Represents an IP pair with information about the plugin

Member.name: ip1
Member.help: IP address that will be created as part of this PortGroup

Member.name: ip2
Member.help: Represents the partner ip. This can be 'null' to signify an absence of a pair.

Member.name: pluginType
Member.help: The plugin type that is going to create IP1

Method2.name: GetIps
Method2.help: Returns the IpPairInfo list.

Argument.name: count
Argument.help: The number if ips that should be returned in the list

Method2.name: HasDynamicIps
Method2.help: Returns true if dynamic ips are to be created, false otherwise

Argument.name: hasDynamicIps
Argument.help: true if dynamic ips are present, false otherwise

Method2.name: GetIpCount
Method2.help: Returns the number if ips in the PortGroup

Method2.name: GetIpCount
Method2.help: Returns the number of ips satisfying the filter parameters

Method2.name: GetRangeInformationList
Method2.help: Returns the range information list

Method2.name: GetPorts
Method2.help: Returns an array of IPort objects containing description of every port in the port group. All exceptions are passed to the caller

Method2.name: GetTestIpAddresses
Method2.help: Returns an IpAddressList(an array of strings) containg ips mapped to ports in the portList. All exceptions are passed to the caller

Argument.name: portList
Argument.help: A list of port description objects (IPort)

Method2.name: GetTestIpAddresses
Method2.help: Returns an IpAddressList(a list of InterfaceInfo) containg ips and Vlan informations mapped to ports in the portList. All exceptions are passed to the caller

Argument.name: portList
Argument.help: A list of port description objects (IPort)

Method2.name: GetTestIpAddresses
Method2.help: Returns the IpAddressList.

Argument.name: portList
Argument.help: A list of port description objects (IPort)

Method2.name: GetShortForm
Method2.help: Returns an IpAddressList(an array of strings) containg ips in the short form

Method2.name: GetAllIpAddresses
Method2.help: Returns an IpAddressList(an array of strings) containg all the ips. All exceptions are passed to the caller

Method2.name: GetIpAddressInfo
Method2.help: Returns a list of port description objects for the corresponding Ip addresses in the ipAddressList. If an ip address does not exists then the corresponding port description object contains empty strings. All exceptions are passed to the caller

Method2.name: GetInterfaceInfoForIps
Method2.help: Returns a list of Interface Info structs for the corresponding ips given. All exceptions are passed to the caller

Method2.name: StackElementPluginInfo
Method2.help: Returns the information for a plugin

Method2.name: CandidateStackPointRefs
Method2.help: Returns a list of candidates

Method2.name: DodPackageToPortGroup
Method2.help: Downloads the specified package to the ports in the port group

Method2.name: SetArpForGateway
Method2.help: Sets arp for gateway

Method2.name: GetGatewayMacForIp
Method2.help: Retrieves the gateway's MAC address for a given IP address

Method2.name: ForceARPCacheRefresh
Method2.help: Refresh the ARP cache so that every new test run starts with clean ARP information

Member.name: startingIp
Member.help: The first IP address of the range

Member.name: incrementBy
Member.help: The increment string for obtaining a new IP address from the previous

Member.name: count
Member.help: number of IPs in the range

Method2.name: GetIpV4V6RangeList
Method2.help: returns the ip ranges for the specified port

Argument.name: ipRangeList
Argument.help: A list of ip range info structures for the specified port

Argument.name: count
Argument.help: This is an internal function. Not intended for general use

Method2.name: RunScript
Method2.help: Runs the specified script on all ports in the port group

Argument.name: scriptFile
Argument.help: The name of the script file to run on the ports

Method2.name: RunScriptOnPort
Method2.help: Runs the specified script on the specified port

Argument.name: scriptFile
Argument.help: The name of the script file to run on the port
